content:
I successfully connected to psiphon’s server on andriod.
So psiphon can work on Windows, IOS and andriod.
That is why you should not use browsers made in China.

title: Discussing teaching of English
content:
In this school term, we has changed a English teacher. She’s called Li KunLan. She’s young. I guess she has only taught 3 years(because she said she has taught a gradution class). so it means that our class is infused fresh blood? Our last English teacher, Wei ZhengHui. He has taught over 20 years. He has rich teaching experience.

Wei said, “copying words is what primary school students do, now we are middle school students, we should use our brain to memory the words”. I quite argee that.

but our present English teacher ask us to copy the words.

Wei also said, “The middle school student do not need to think about the grammers all day long, only college students study grammer”. I think so, because what we learn now is simple, our brain can understand it, do not need to take notes. some grammers are hard to understand. that is when we need to memory in different way or take notes.

but Li write the grammers on board every lesson, and always says terminologies. I am sure a lot of classmates do not understand what she is talking about.

暑假都做了啥：

  1. 开发renge notepad
  2. 做了一个按时切壁纸程序
  3. 学计算机网络（未完成）
Why I am so excited when I connected to the psiphon.
